channel.title: DX-World
channel.description: The World’s Biggest and Best DX News Service for DXers and IOTA enthusiasts

item.title: HF0PAS – South Shetland Islands
item.dc:creator: DX-World
item.description: [REFRESH] – Rafal, SQ4O informs that all going well, he will try to be active as HF0PAS from the Henryk Arctowski Polish Antarctic Station, King George Island, South Shetland Islands after May. He will remain there until October 2026. News updates will posted on the HF0PAS QRZ page.

item.title: TX9W – Marquesas Islands
item.dc:creator: DX-World
item.description: [UPDATE] – by K5WE. Dave (WD5COV) reports he ran 160 all night long from 0330z to West Coast sunrise 1400z. Had a good night on 160 with over 100 QSOs, many NA, about 10 SA/Caribbean, and 5 EU. He will keep the 160 antenna up another night. Will try to get a 60 meter antenna […]

item.title: E6MGA – Niue
item.dc:creator: DX-World
item.description: Murray, ZL1MGA will be active from Niue as E6MGA during April 25 to May 1, 2026. QRV on 40 & 20m, possibly 15m too; SSB & FT8. No paper QSLs. Updates here.

item.title: 3X3A – Republic of Guinea
item.dc:creator: DX-World
item.description: [UPDATE] by Elvira, IV3FSG / 3X3A. On April 25th my adventure here on Roume Island will come to an end. It has been an intense two weeks filled with heavy pile-ups, challenging propagation conditions, and the joy of connecting with so many friends from every corner of the world. I am about to begin my […]

item.title: JD1BMH – Ogasawara
item.dc:creator: DX-World
item.description: [REFRESH] – Harry, JG7PSJ informs DX-World that he will again be active as JD1BMH from Ogasawara between April 26 to May 4, 2026. QRV on 40-10m CW, SSB & RTTY. Updates on “X” and JD1BMH webpage. Soundbite / recording from previous activity.

item.title: 5Z4/MM0ZBH – Kenya
item.dc:creator: DX-World
item.description: [PICS / SOUNDBITE] – Many thanks to operator Paul for sending pictures showing his QTH and surrounds. — 20m CW recording by DX-World. [APRIL 19] – Using wire antennas and operating holiday-style, Paul 5Z4/MM0ZBH is active from Murang’a, Kenya until June 15th. Activity so far has been on 10m FT8 and 20m CW & SSB. […]

item.title: KD0VUY/HR5 – Honduras
item.dc:creator: DX-World
item.description: Dirk, KD0VUY/HR5 has been operating portable from San Jeronimo, Copan, Honduras since April 15th. He is there until May 1st. Equipment: Yaesu FT-891 (100w) and Chelegance MC-750 vertical antenna. He runs SSB and FT8. QSL via H/c.

item.title: T88DT – Palau
item.dc:creator: DX-World
item.description: Noboru, JH1OLB will again be active from the VIP Guest Hotel, Koror, Palau as T88DT during November 26 to December 2, 2026. QRV on 160-6m; SSB, CW, RTTY, Digi. Particiaption in the CQWW CW contest. QSL via H/c.

item.title: ZD8KX – Ascension Island
item.dc:creator: DX-World
item.description: Fer, M0HXC (also ZB2KX) announces that he will be active from Ascension Island as ZD8KX during May 25-29, 2026. QRV using an IC-705 and EFHW antenna (66ft / 20m). This will be a low power activity on CW, SSB & FT8/4/2. QSL via QRZ.com (no LoTW or eQSL). More info here.

item.title: Z66SP – Republic of Kosovo
item.dc:creator: DX-World
item.description: [QRV / AUDIO] DX INFO by team. Since early April, intensive preparations have been underway for our trip to Kosovo. One of the steps was setting up three antennas that we planned as the main ones. The antennas have been assembled, adjusted and tested. There is also a dish for QO-100. The antennas are ready […]

item.title: DX-World Weekly Bulletin
item.dc:creator: DX-World
item.description: [#660] The latest FREE NON-SUBSCRIPTION DX-World Weekly Bulletin written by Bjorn ON9CFG is available to download. Click below to get the newest jam-packed edition which this week runs to 15 pages. Previous bulletins can all be found here. Please contact Bjorn with any updates or errors. DOWNLOAD THE LATEST BULLETIN =====

item.title: V4/EI8KN & V4/EI7BR – St Kitts
item.dc:creator: DX-World
item.description: Roger, EI8KN and David, G4CKS will be active from St Kitts (QTH: V47JA) during May 13-21, 2026. QRV on 160-6m; SSB & FT8. Operating as V4/EI8KN & V4/EI7BR, Roger may also use V49B (contest call). QSL via LoTW.

item.title: AU2M – Arnala Island, AS-169
item.dc:creator: DX-World
item.description: [INFO] by VU2RS. We are incredibly grateful to announce significant contributions that have come at a critical time for the AU2M Arnala Island Reactivation project. Following a major setback—the loss of a large shipment containing vital coaxial cables, patch cables, receive antennas, and other essential equipment during transit from Lakshadweep to Hyderabad—our project faced a […]

item.title: C5B, C5C, & C5D – The Gambia
item.dc:creator: DX-World
item.description: [REFRESH] Arnaud, F4AGG and Luc F5RAV will be active from The Gambia during April 25 to May 8, 2026. The following callsigns will be used: — C5B from Bijolo Island AF-060 (SAT activity). — C5C mainland Gambia (SSB & CW). — C5D mainland Gambia (RTTY, PSK & FT8). All calls via LoTW or direct to […]

item.title: RI1ANY – Novolazarevskaya Station, Antarctica
item.dc:creator: DX-World
item.description: Yuri, RI1ANY is now QRV via QO-100 satellite from Novolazarevskaya Station (JB59vf). After some test SSB contacts, today he operated FT8 and FT4 modes. He does not speak fluent English nor he has pileup experience, so please be patient. He is assigned to this base for a full year, so there will be plenty of […]

item.title: 7P8WR – Lesotho
item.dc:creator: DX-World
item.description: [UPCOMING] – Paolo IZ0EVI, Diego IZ0EWJ and Luca IZ6DSQ will be active from Lesotho as 7P8WR during April 23 to May 1, 2026. QRV on 40-10m; SSB & FT8. QSL via IZ0EWJ. Website and Logsearch. Band-plan below.

item.title: 4W/EA2TA, 4W/EA3NT & 4W/IZ7ATN – Timor-Leste
item.dc:creator: DX-World
item.description: [PICS /AUDIO] – On the scene shots with thanks to Christian, 4W/EA3NT. [APRIL 21] – With licenses in hand, look out for George, 4W/EA2TA, Christian 4W/EA3NT and Simon 4W/IZ7ATN to be active from Timor-Leste (OC-148) during April 21-28, 2026. QRV on 80-6m; CW, SSB & FT8. (60m not allowed in 4W). QSL all calls via […]

item.title: 3D2JK – Lakeba Island, OC-095
item.dc:creator: DX-World
item.description: [QRT] – by SP5APW. The Lakeba adventure is over. During almost full days of activity I managed to log 3300 QSOs with 86 DXCC. Bands conditions were challenging. While the number of QSOs increased quite rapidly over the first two days, the last two were a struggle for every new station in the log. Last […]

item.title: VK9HJ – Norfolk Island
item.dc:creator: DX-World
item.description: Dom, VK2HJ travels to Norfolk Island regularly for work and when he has free time will operate as VK9HJ from the island. His antenna is a simple telescopic 1/4 wave vertical covering 20m through to 10m running 100w. QSOs logged via QRZ.com. – AUDIO from VK2HJ/VK9 – Norfolk Island (Feb 2023)

item.title: 9T0MD – Democratic Republic of Congo
item.dc:creator: DX-World
item.description: [NEWS UPDATE] – Team 9T0MD is pleased to announce the launch of its website: more than just a repository of information, it’s a true reference point for the entire DX community. A dynamic space, designed to be experienced and shared, where the expedition takes shape day by day. From preparation to operational moments, up to […]
